events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-frontman Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Macca
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles or solo track?

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: Singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful vocals with Yazoo and her successful solo career, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 65th birthday to the incredible Alison Moyet! From Yazoo to solo hits, her voice is iconic.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning singer, songwriter, and producer Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it you we're looking for? It is! Happy 77th birthday to the legendary Lionel Richie!

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic pop star Cyndi Lauper, known for hits like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi's Still Shining
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the fabulous Cyndi Lauper! Still shining after all these years.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63 today. His music lives on.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, in 2009.

angles.name: King of Pop Legacy
angles.copy: 17 years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace & Love Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Wishing him peace and love today.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Sir Brian May! What's your favourite May solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Still got those moves!

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember the first video they played?

events.title: 32 years of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop changed forever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A truly iconic festival!

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music is timeless.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, we lost a true icon. Tupac Shakur's impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we said goodbye to the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix. His music continues to electrify generations.

events.title: 57 years of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most iconic ever!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis co-frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday LG
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll.

events.title: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' (UK re-release)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day in 1975, John Lennon's powerful 'Imagine' single was re-released in the UK. A message that still resonates.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod! It changed how we listen to music forever. Do you still have yours?
